title: Expose Deno availability and audit readiness in af doctor
evidence: The agent protocol depends on Deno audit tasks, but local validation can fail with `deno: command not found` outside CI.
recommended_action: Extend `af doctor --json` to probe Deno and report whether `deno task audit:repo` can be executed locally.
acceptance_criteria: `af doctor --json` includes a Deno tool version entry.
Missing Deno is reported as a structured optional tooling warning.
CLI docs mention the Deno readiness signal.

title: Add first-class CLI regression tests for registry, vectors, and scaffold workflows
evidence: Existing CLI integration tests cover doctor, wrapper generation, core check, and broken fixtures, but not `registry check`, `board matrix`, `vectors generate`, `core new`, or `board new`.
recommended_action: Add deterministic integration tests for the newer unified monorepo commands using temporary directories and JSON output assertions.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify both success cases and at least one structured failure case.
Temporary generated artifacts do not modify tracked repository files.

title: Make af-mod-add simulation reachable through the unified CLI
evidence: `cores/af-mod-add` carries testbench and Verilator filelists, but the current backend flow is manifest-source based and does not yet expose a variant-aware af-mod-add simulation lane.
recommended_action: Add a core simulation mode that can select RTL variants and testbench filelists from `af-core.toml` or a dedicated simulation manifest section.
acceptance_criteria: `af core sim cores/af-mod-add --backend verilator` can run the imported testbench when Verilator is installed.
The simulation path is documented in the agent protocol and CLI reference.

title: Add automated schema validation for agent protocol and ledgers
evidence: `docs/agent/agent-operating-protocol.yaml` is machine-readable, and JSONL ledgers parse with jq, but the local environment lacks ruby, yq, yamllint, and Deno for YAML/schema validation.
recommended_action: Add a repository validation task that parses the agent protocol and validates TODO, maturity, and log JSONL entries against explicit schemas.
acceptance_criteria: The validation runs in CI and reports structured failures.
